name: Classic French Toast
servings: serves 4 | prep. time 10 minutes | cooking time 15-20 minutes
method: In a large mixing bowl, whisk together the eggs, milk, ground cinnamon, ground cardamom, and salt.
Dip each piece of bread into the egg mixture.
Melt the butter in a large nonstick frying pan over medium heat.
Working in batches, pan-fry the bread for 2-3 minutes on each side.
